skills.name: Sneak Hit
skills.effect_text:
Final Damage increases by CaptionRatio % at critical hit (when attacked from the back)
Half of the effect is applied when attacked from the front and side

skills.name: Feint
skills.description: Attack at the enemy's back and cause damage. Move to the enemy and apply a debuff that stops them from changing direction. Apply [Feint: Expose Weakness] that increases the Final Damage of Rogue skills to yourself for 3.5 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
Discover more
Handbags & Purses
Maps
Respiratory Conditions
Distance: 130
[Change Direction] Duration: CaptionTime second(s)
[Feint: Expose Weakness]
- Final Damage of Rogue skill increases by CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Evasion
skills.effect_text:
Increases Evasion by CaptionRatio %
Discover more
Handbags & Purses
coffee
Coffee
Increases Movement Speed by CaptionRatio2
Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Burrow
skills.description: Hide under the ground to conceal your body. Inside the ground
skills.effect_text:
Burrow Duration: CaptionTime seconds
[Silence] Debuff Duration: 3 seconds

skills.name: Lachrymator
skills.description: Throw tear gas at a targeted area. The target becomes afflicted with [Blind] and unable to attack.

skills.name: Backstab
skills.description: Continuously attack using your dagger. First overheat may stun the enemy. However, [Backstab Penalty] is applied to yourself when stunning the enemy by the Backstab effect in PvP areas. (Defense decreases by 30% for 3 seconds)
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x2 times
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
[Stun] Duration: CaptionRatio2 seconds
(Duration x1.5 when attacking from rear)

skills.name: Knife Throw
skills.description: Throw a knife at an enemy to inflict the [Bull's-eye] debuff. Enemies affected by Bull's-eye have their Block reduced and become unable to evade melee attacks.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
[Bull's-eye]Duration: CaptionRatio seconds
- Decreases Block by 20%
- Cannot evade melee attack

attributes.name: Dagger Mastery: Sudden Attack
attributes.description: * Damage increases by 4% per attribute level when equipping dagger (When using the second slot, applied totally only when equipping 2 daggers. Half of the value is applied when equipping one)

attributes.name: Backstab: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Backstab] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Backstab: Massive Bleeding
attributes.description:
* Inflicts bleeding enemies with [Massive Bleeding] for 10 seconds when attacked by [Backstab]

* Increases the duration by 1 second per attribute level

* Boss monsters are not affected by [Massive Bleeding] debuff

* Massive Bleeding damage is in proportion to the character's STR and Physical Attack

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Lachrymator: Increased Range
attributes.description:
* Increases range of [Lachrymator] to 75

* Increases SP consumption by 40%

attributes.name: Burrow: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Burrow] duration by 0.5% per attribute level

* Increases additionally by 10% when mastering the maximum level

attributes.name: Knife Throw: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Knife Throw] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Knife Throw: Zenith
attributes.description:
* The range of [Knife Throwing] is changed to a circular area around you

* [Bull's eye] debuff does not occur

attributes.name: [Arts] Backstab: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Backstab] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Knife Throw: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Knife Throw] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Lachrymator: Lethal Gas
attributes.description:
* Original effect is removed

* Decreases cooldown by 10 seconds

* Damages the enemy inside the Lachrymator every second (Factor: 50% of [Backstab factor including the number of hits])

* Number of targets : 5 (3 during PvP)

attributes.name: Lachrymator: Escape
attributes.description:
* Casts instantly, apply Silence, Invincibility for 1 second, increases Movement Speed by 30

* Increases SP consumption by 40%

attributes.name: Feint: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Feint] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Feint: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Feint] by 1.25% per attribute level
